# Projects Context

## Obsidian home project system
- Canonical user-facing house/project notes live in `/home/mike/vault/Home`.
- The system includes dashboard, area notes, project notes, maintenance, decisions, contractors, purchases, and templates.
- Active project notes should preserve useful reasoning context, not just task titles.

## Current notable captured projects
- Kids bathroom drywall repair from pulled-out toilet paper holder.
- Take old bed from basement to dump.
- Replace loose toilet paper holder in master bathroom.
- Renovate kids bathroom (low priority, long-term).
- Replace top floor carpet with LVP; hire out rather than DIY because Mike's time is better spent on Harbor View Consulting.
- Patch and paint living room ceiling water spots after master bathroom tub overflow leak; cosmetic repair should follow confidence that source is fixed.
- Clean walls throughout house; upstairs is especially bad.
- Weed and clean up backyard hill before spring growth accelerates, on a nice-weather day.
